hooks.command: unset VIRTUAL_ENV; export PYTHONWARNINGS=ignore::SyntaxWarning; CORE=$(find ~/.claude/plugins/cache -path '*/alhazen-core/*/alhazen_core.py' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$CORE" ] && [ -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../alhazen-core/alhazen_core.py" ] && CORE="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../alhazen-core/alhazen_core.py"; [ -z "$CORE" ] && [ -f "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/skills/alhazen-core/alhazen_core.py" ] && CORE="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/skills/alhazen-core/alhazen_core.py"; if [ -z "$CORE" ]; then echo "alhazen-core not found; skipping (install: /plugin install alhazen-core@skillful-alhazen)" && exit 0; fi; CORE_DIR=$(dirname "$CORE"); TYPEDB_DATABASE=alh_personal uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" init && TYPEDB_DATABASE=alh_personal uv run --project "$CORE_DIR" python "$CORE" load-schema "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/schema.tql"
